choices.text: positionSize = (equity × riskPercent) / (entryPrice − stopPrice). Fixed dollar risk regardless of stop distance. Smaller positions with wider stops; larger with tight stops.

questions.explanation: Risk-adjusted sizing: account risk / stop distance.

choices.text: Expectancy = (Win% × AvgWin in R) − (Loss% × AvgLoss in R). 40% win × 3R − 60% loss × 1R = 0.6R/trade. Positive = profitable. High win rate with small wins / large losses = negative.

questions.explanation: Expectancy in R-multiples reveals true edge.
